visual_attributes.morphology: large-scale electric discharges with varied visual shapes
distinctive_features: clusters of small, decameter scale ionization balls
visual_attributes.size_and_scale: 50 to 90 km altitude range, up to 50 km wide
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: clusters with tendrils below and branches above

domain_specific_visual.speed: up to ten percent the speed of light

functional_attributes.primary_function: electrical discharge in the upper atmosphere

domain_specific_functional.trigger: positive lightning between thundercloud and ground
domain_specific_functional.duration: a few milliseconds to up to 100 milliseconds

relationships.description: Sprites are triggered by positive lightning discharges.
Sprites are part of a group of upper-atmospheric optical phenomena.
Sprites are sometimes mistaken for ELVES due to visual similarity.

contextual_attributes.geographic_range: observed globally over large thunderstorm systems
contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: named after mythological air spirits due to their elusive nature
